'''Domain Qel''' was a [[domain]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[shaper caste]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]<ref name="Conquest" /> in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],<ref name="TERC" /> Domain Qel was among the smaller minor shaper domains. Yuuzhan Vong from the domain bore forehead marks that distinguished them as members of their domain, such as the young shaper [[Tsun Qel]]. Qel helped the [[Master Shaper]] [[Yal Phaath]] acquire the evidence needed to expose the heretical Master Shaper [[Mezhan Kwaad]] by posing as a fellow heretic to Kwaad's apprentice, [[Nen Yim]].<ref name="Conquest" />

==Behind the scenes==
Domain Qel first appeared in the [[2001]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'', written by [[Greg Keyes]].<ref name="Conquest" />
